title: Lost Phone Report
context: You have lost your phone while traveling across the city and need to report it at a customer support desk or police station. Explain where you last saw it, describe the device, and ask what to do next.
user_role: A traveler reporting a missing mobile phone and asking for help
agent_role: A support officer collecting details and explaining the reporting process
opening_prompt: I'm sorry to hear that. Could you tell me when and where you last remember having your phone?
